description_long: This is a modern, high-back swivel chair with a sleek, minimalist design, commonly found in office or conference room settings. The chair features a tall, slightly contoured backrest with horizontal ribbed padding, providing ergonomic support and a contemporary aesthetic. Its seat and back are upholstered in black leather or faux leather, giving it a polished, professional appearance. The armrests are slim, metal-framed, and padded on top, seamlessly integrated into the chair's structure. The base is a five-pointed star made of metal, equipped with five black casters for smooth mobility. A central support column, likely telescoping for height adjustment, connects the seat to the base, emphasizing both functionality and style.
description: A sleek, high-back black swivel chair with ribbed padding, metal armrests, and a five-caster star base. Its modern design and ergonomic features make it ideal for office environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall, ribbed backrest, padded seat, and both armrests clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the chair's slim profile, the angle of the backrest, and the armrest's attachment.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, solid back panel and the metal support bar at the top.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the armrest and the seat's thin profile.
attribute_central_support_column: A cylindrical, metallic, telescoping column connecting the seat to the five-pointed star base, likely allowing for height adjustment.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, rectangular, and slightly contoured with horizontal ribbed padding, upholstered in black leather or faux leather, providing ergonomic support.
attribute_armrest_style: Slim, metal-framed armrests with black padding on top, attached to both the seat and backrest for stability and comfort.
